phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto al arco de entrada, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL AHR-koh DEH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL AHR-koh DEH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto al arco de entrada, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the flamenco cave performances are
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo ver flamenco en las cuevas?
phrases.pronunciation: DÓN-deh poo-EH-doh BEHR flah-MEHN-koh EHN LAHS koo-EH-bahs

likely_response.local: Baje a la Cueva de la Rocío, al
likely_response.pronunciation: BAH-heh AH LAH koo-EH-bah DEH LAH roh-THÍ-oh AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the path towards the nearby venues.

responses.english: Follow the path towards the nearby venues.
responses.phonetic: BAH-heh AH LAH koo-EH-bah DEH LAH roh-THÍ-oh AHL
responses.french: Baje a la Cueva de la Rocío, al

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Sacromonte heritage circuit
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego al recorrido patrimonial del Sacromonte?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿KOH-moh YEH-goh al reh-koh-REE-doh pah-tree-moh-NEE-ahl del sah-kroh-MOHN-teh?

likely_response.local: Siga las señales del camino histórico arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs DEHL kah-MEE-noh ee-STÓ-ree-koh ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the historic path up.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the historic path up.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs DEHL kah-MEE-noh ee-STÓ-ree-koh ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: Siga las señales del camino histórico arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the abbey museum is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el museo de la abadía?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el moo-SEH-oh deh lah ah-BAH-dee-ah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
